name: fairlaunch
description: Fair-launch commitment layer for community token launches. Communities form before a token exists; slots fill, the pool launches atomically at one price, creator holds 0%, backers earn a share of trading fees. Production skeleton with a swappable chain adapter.

scripts.test: tsx src/lib/money.test.ts && tsx src/domain/fees.test.ts && tsx src/domain/stateMachine.test.ts
